info.name: Job Application Tracker API
info.description: Backend API for the Job Application Tracking Portal. Azure Functions (Node.js/TypeScript) with Cosmos DB, Blob Storage, and Event Grid.

request.description: Returns paginated list of non-deleted applications with summary fields. Supports filtering by status, date range, and sorting.

response.name: Paginated application list

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: No valid session or missing owner role

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Creates a new job application. Status is always set to 'Applying'. Files are uploaded separately via SAS token.

request.description: Returns all soft-deleted applications ordered by deletedAt descending. No pagination. Supports restore/undo UI.

response.name: Deleted applications list

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Get SAS token for file upload

request.description: Generates a 5-minute SAS token scoped to a single blob with create+write permissions. Application must exist and not be soft-deleted.
